option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project("quantummessenger")
# Tell CMake where the liboqs header files are include_directories(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/liboqs/include)
# Register liboqs.a as a pre-compiled library add_library(liboqs STATIC IMPORTED) set_target_properties(liboqs PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/liboqs/lib/${ANDROID_ABI}/liboqs.a )
# Build your native-lib as before add_library( native-lib SHARED native-lib.cpp )
find_library(log-lib log)
# Link native-lib against both liboqs and Android log target_link_libraries( native-lib liboqs ${log-lib} )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project("quantummessenger")
# Tell CMake where the liboqs header files are include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/liboqs/include)
# Register liboqs.a as a pre-compiled library add_library(liboqs STATIC IMPORTED) set_target_properties(liboqs PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/liboqs/lib/${ANDROID_ABI}/liboqs.a )
# Build your native-lib as before add_library( native-lib SHARED native-lib.cpp )
find_library(log-lib log)
# Link native-lib against both liboqs and Android log target_link_libraries( native-lib liboqs ${log-lib} )

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
